authorization_phrase: Authorize s14-d1-cross-sector cash-equity P2 phase-2 plan only — bound by DR10 v2.

c1_c8_phase_2_safety_contracts_instantia.C3_safety_counters: set-membership safety counter pattern (stale_fill, unsupported_order_type, warmup_order_submit, etc.); all-zero rollup; extended_hours_fill NOT_APPLICABLE (daily bars)
c1_c8_phase_2_safety_contracts_instantia.C4_boundary_alignment: US equity RTH session boundary; eod_cancel aligns to session close (NYSE/NASDAQ 16:00 ET); daily-bar so intraday boundary trivial
c1_c8_phase_2_safety_contracts_instantia.C5_corporate_action_handling: CASH-EQUITY ADAPTATION: splits documented + applied per split_only convention (NOT structurally absent like futures). Known splits: AAPL 2020-08-31 4:1 (applied+verified); JPM none; XOM none. Dividends NOT adjusted (split_only). divCash informational only. DR9 documented_split_event_consistency PASSED all 3.
c1_c8_phase_2_safety_contracts_instantia.C6_inherited_constraints: 16-entry inherited_constraints_block carried verbatim from SEAL (REC1-equivalent + DA3=B + DA4=B + K9/DR10-reachability + split_only + cross-sector universe + A7/K10 load-bearing + DR9 PASS carried + ...)
c1_c8_phase_2_safety_contracts_instantia.C7_verdict_closed_enum: verdict restricted to closed enum (READY_FOR_LONGER_BACKTEST / INSUFFICIENT_SAMPLE / FAIL_SAFETY / REJECT_FAST / INCONCLUSIVE_HOLD / ...); forbidden-token blocklist; no profitability/live-ready/money-proven tokens
c1_c8_phase_2_safety_contracts_instantia.C8_lifecycle_states: permanent lifecycle attributes carried (DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY_NOT_LIVE_GRADE; trading PAUSED; live BLOCKED_AT_6_GATES; FRC NEVER_GRANTED; no_strategy_optimization_authorized; no_dr_redefinition_post_seal)

dr10_v2_binding: carried by-reference from SEAL/P1 (framework SEAL 78cd22e); not redefined at P2
inherited_constraints_block_C6_carried_v: REC1-equivalent (BINDING): OOS K9 reachable with improved margin vs all-tech (cross-sector higher signal independence ~75% vs all-tech ~60%; expected effective rate 45-79/y vs 50/y OOS floor). If observed effective IS rate falls below 25/y basket-summed, OOS K9 unreachability becomes structurally probable -> PARKED_SAFE_BUT_OOS_INDETERMINATE per s10-d2/s12-d1 precedent. The chain shall NOT relax K9 at OOS.
DA3=B (BINDING): per-trade risk pct = 0.005 (0.5%); standard sizing (not nano); admissible under DR10 v2 for cash equity
DA4=B (BINDING): START_CASH_USD = 100000 ($100k); DR10 v2 cost_drag clears strong margin at $100k for cash equity
K9-reachability discipline applied at PLAN+DRAFT+SEAL; binding for all subsequent phases
DR10-v2-reachability discipline applied at PLAN+DRAFT+SEAL (AND-conjunction); CLEARS WITH STRONG MARGIN
K9_THRESHOLD_INVIOLATE: closed_trades_basket_summed >= 100; no relaxation at any phase
Mechanic family F3-adjacent RSI(3) bi-directional mean-reversion LOCKED at PLAN
RSI thresholds 15/55/85/45 LOCKED at PLAN; modification post-SEAL FORBIDDEN
DR10 = v2 AND-conjunction by-reference to framework SEAL 78cd22e; thresholds 0.50 turnover / 0.05 cost_drag immutable; no_dr_redefinition_post_seal
split_only adjustment convention LOCKED (DA17); switching/mixing post-SEAL FORBIDDEN
Cross-sector universe {AAPL (Tech), JPM (Financials), XOM (Energy)} LOCKED at PLAN; universe widening/substitution post-SEAL FORBIDDEN
A7 effective_independent_bets + K10 avg_pairwise_correlation LOAD-BEARING (multi-name cross-sector; A7 ~2.3-2.8 / K10 ~0.30-0.50 expected; the candidate's central diversification thesis)
Cross-sector DR9 data-availability gate PASSED all 3 symbols (AAPL reused+carried; JPM/XOM fresh-fetched+audited); sealed at b13af03 report_seal a8ff9126...; data provenance locked
All-tech sibling DRAFT (214bae0) preserved byte-stable; non-mutually-exclusive sibling; this candidate is NOT a _revN_
P6 IS PASS (if reached) does NOT imply READY at OOS; OOS requires separate P10-equivalent authorization
P6 PASS NEVER implies live-readiness; 6-gate live-block applies regardless of any verdict; DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY_NOT_LIVE_GRADE permanent
